questions.text: Which of these is a method of soil conservation?
questions.explanation: Contour ploughing prevents soil erosion on slopes by ploughing along the contours. Deforestation, overgrazing, and mining cause soil erosion.

questions.text: Water harvesting helps in conservation of water.
questions.explanation: Water harvesting collects and stores rainwater, helping conserve water resources and recharge groundwater.

questions.text: What is the main cause of land degradation?
questions.correctAnswer: Deforestation, overgrazing, and improper agricultural practices.
questions.explanation: Land degradation is caused by deforestation, overgrazing by livestock, excessive use of fertilizers/pesticides, and mining activities.

questions.text: The process of conversion of fertile land into desert is called ________.
questions.explanation: Desertification is the process by which fertile land becomes desert, typically as a result of drought, deforestation, or inappropriate agriculture.
